candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Not current assets; included only because it appeared in candidates.

variables.notes: Clear reported total for current assets.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Cash component, but narrower than total cash and cash equivalents.
Restricted cash should generally not be preferred over cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending balance agrees numerically, but balance sheet line is preferred.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning balance, not the balance-sheet cash variable.

candidates.row_label: Net increase / (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Cash flow movement, not the balance-sheet stock.
Exact match for total current liabilities.
Not current liabilities; included only because it appeared in candidates.

variables.notes: Clear reported total for current liabilities.

candidates.why: This appears in the current-liabilities section before Total Current Liabilities, so it is the best match for short-term debt/current borrowings and excludes lease liabilities.
Current financing liability but lease-related, and leases should be excluded from STD baseline.
A second occurrence appears after Total Current Liabilities in the non-current section, so it is not STD.

variables.notes: Selected the current-section occurrence of 'Loans and borrowings' as STD. Excluded 'Current lease liabilities' per rule and did not include the non-current duplicate to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Most likely current taxes payable/current tax liability line on the balance sheet.
Cash flow tax payment, not balance-sheet taxes payable.
Deferred taxes are not taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: No explicit 'taxes payable' label, but 'Income Taxes' appears in current liabilities and is the best balance-sheet match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Best match for total/net PPE on the balance sheet.
Gross PPE exists, but net/total PPE is preferred when available.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Purchase of Property, Plant and Equipment
candidates.why: Capital expenditure flow, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Intangible Assets - excluding Goodwill - Net - Total
candidates.why: Intangibles are not PPE.
Intangibles are not PPE.
Intangibles are not PPE.
Intangible contra-asset, not PPE.
Cash flow for intangibles, not PPE.

variables.notes: Preferred net PPE line selected over gross PPE.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flows from operating activities
candidates.why: Exact operating cash flow subtotal on the cash flow statement.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flows from operating activities

variables.notes: Clear cash flow from operations line.
